page: Vultr vcg-l40s-16c-180g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring an NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB of VRAM based on the Ada Lovelace architecture. The host hardware includes 16 Intel x86_64 vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with a single thread per core, operating on a shared CPU allocation model.

The system is equipped with 180.0 GB of system memory, providing 11.25 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is provided by a 1200 GB NVMe SSD, which delivers high-speed read and write capabilities for local datasets and model weights. A single complimentary public IPv4 address is included.

This hardware profile is optimized for workloads requiring significant GPU acceleration and substantial VRAM, such as large language model inference, generative AI, and complex graphics rendering. The shared CPU allocation represents a tradeoff, making the instance cost-efficient for GPU-heavy tasks that do not require dedicated, continuous host CPU performance.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-16c-180g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server designed for GPU-accelerated workloads. It features a single NVIDIA L40S GPU from the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing 48 GB of VRAM. The host system is powered by 16 Intel x86_64 vCPUs with a shared allocation model, 16 physical cores, and a single thread per core. It is configured with 180.0 GB of system memory, yielding 11.25 GB of RAM per core, and includes 1200 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. This server is optimized for workloads such as machine learning inference, generative AI, and graphics rendering, where GPU performance and VRAM capacity are critical. The shared CPU allocation offers a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-centric tasks that do not demand dedicated host CPU resources.
og_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-16c-180g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring an NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB VRAM, 16 Intel vCPUs, 180 GB RAM, and 1200 GB NVMe SSD storage for GPU-accelerated workloads.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized server featuring an NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB VRAM, 180 GB RAM, and high-speed NVMe storage.
